__init__.py
repo_map.py
  def _should_skip_dir(dirname: str) -> bool
  def _collect_source_files(workspace_root: str) -> List[str]
  def _compute_files_hash(workspace_root: str, files: List[str]) -> str
  def _format_signature_node(node: SignatureNode, indent: int) -> str
  def _format_repo_map(
    workspace_root: str,
    file_signatures: Dict[str, List[SignatureNode]],
    source_files: List[str],
) -> str
  def _truncate_to_budget(text: str, max_tokens: int) -> str
  def _cache_dir(workspace_root: str) -> str
  def _read_cache(workspace_root: str, current_hash: str) -> Optional[str]
  def _write_cache(workspace_root: str, content: str, file_hash: str) -> None
  def generate_repo_map(workspace_root: str = ".", max_tokens: int = _DEFAULT_MAX_TOKENS) -> str
  def invalidate_cache(workspace_root: str) -> None
tree_sitter_parser.py
  def _check_tree_sitter() -> bool
  class SignatureNode
  def _get_language(lang_name: str)
  def _node_text(node, source_bytes: bytes) -> str
  def _extract_python_signatures(root, source_bytes: bytes) -> List[SignatureNode]
  def _extract_python_signatures_node(class_node, source_bytes: bytes) -> List[SignatureNode]
  def _python_func_sig(node, source_bytes: bytes) -> Tuple[str, str]
  def _extract_js_ts_signatures(root, source_bytes: bytes, lang: str) -> List[SignatureNode]
  def _extract_js_ts_node(
    node, source_bytes: bytes, results: List[SignatureNode], lang: str, top_level: bool = False
)
  def detect_language(file_path: str) -> Optional[str]
  def parse_file_signatures(file_path: str, language: Optional[str] = None) -> List[SignatureNode]
cli/
  __init__.py
  execute_shell.py
    def _runtime_precheck_message(command: str) -> str
    def _runtime_not_found_hint(command: str) -> str
    def _kill_process_tree(process: subprocess.Popen) -> None
    def _validated_shell_cwd(cwd: str) -> str
    def execute_bash_command(
    command: str,
    timeout: int = 60,
    cwd: str = ".",
    description: str = "",
) -> str
  manage_long_running.py
    def start_long_running_process(
    command: str,
    name: Optional[str] = None,
    cwd: str = ".",
    env: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None,
) -> str
    def stop_long_running_process(
    pid: int,
    graceful_timeout_sec: float = 5.0,
    force_kill: bool = True,
) -> str
    def list_long_running_processes() -> str
    def get_long_running_status(pid: int) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]
    def register_external_process(pid: int, name: str, command: str) -> str
core_mechanisms/
  __init__.py
  colored_logger.py
    class ColoredLogger
  config.py
    class MiroConfig
      def __new__(cls)
      def __init__(self)
      def _load_config(self)
      def get(self, key: str, default: Any = None) -> Any
      def set(self, key: str, value: Any)
      def reload(self)
      def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
      def save(self, path: Optional[str] = None)
    def get_config() -> MiroConfig
  context_manager.py
    class ContextManager
      def __init__(self, workspace: str = ".")
      def get_file_hash(self, file_path: str) -> str
      def generate_repo_map(self, max_depth: int = 3) -> str
      def _extract_python_structure(self, file_path: str, depth: int) -> str
  enums.py
    class OperationType(Enum)
    class FallbackStrategy(Enum)
  execution_boundary_context.py
    def _config_get_bool(key: str) -> bool
    def _merged_raw() -> Dict[str, bool]
    def get_effective_full_unrestricted() -> bool
    def get_effective_sub_allow(key: str) -> bool
    def set_boundary_overrides(updates: Dict[str, bool]) -> None
    def clear_boundary_overrides() -> None
    def get_context_workspace_root() -> Optional[str]
    def boundary_override(**kwargs: bool) -> Iterator[None]
    def workspace_root_override(workspace_root: str) -> Iterator[None]
  fallback_manager.py
    class FallbackManager
      def __init__(self)
      def execute_with_fallback(self,
                            file_path: str,
                            old_str: str,
                            new_str: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
      def _strategy_exact_match(self, file_path: str, old_str: str, new_str: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
      def _strategy_fuzzy_match(self, file_path: str, old_str: str, new_str: str,
                             threshold: float = 0.80) -> Dict[str, Any]
      def _strategy_ast_edit(self, file_path: str, old_str: str, new_str: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
      def _extract_selector_from_code(self, code: str) -> Optional[str]
  log_config.py
  path_security.py
    class PathSecurityError(Exception)
    def _allow_outside_workspace(
    explicit: Optional[bool],
    path_profile: PathProfile,
) -> bool
    def get_workspace_root() -> Path
    def validate_path(
    path: str,
    *,
    workspace_root: Optional[str] = None,
    allow_create: bool = True,
    must_exist: bool = False,
    allow_paths_outside_workspace: Optional[bool] = None,
    path_profile: PathProfile = "file",
) -> Tuple[Path, str]
    def validate_search_scope(
    path: str,
    *,
    must_exist: bool = True,
    allow_create: bool = False,
) -> Path
    def safe_path_for_read(
    path: str,
    workspace_root: Optional[str] = None,
    *,
    allow_paths_outside_workspace: Optional[bool] = None,
    path_profile: PathProfile = "file",
) -> Path
    def safe_path_for_write(
    path: str,
    workspace_root: Optional[str] = None,
    *,
    allow_paths_outside_workspace: Optional[bool] = None,
    path_profile: PathProfile = "file",
) -> Path
    def safe_path_for_delete(
    path: str,
    workspace_root: Optional[str] = None,
    *,
    allow_paths_outside_workspace: Optional[bool] = None,
    path_profile: PathProfile = "file",
) -> Path
  shell_security.py
    class ShellSecurityError(Exception)
    def check_shell_command(
    command: str,
    *,
    enabled: bool = True,
    level: str = "confirm",
    blacklist: List[str] = None,
    whitelist: List[str] = None,
    allow_sudo: bool = False,
) -> Tuple[bool, str, str]
    def format_security_error(
    command: str,
    reason: str,
    severity: str,
    level: str = "confirm",
) -> str
    def get_shell_security_config()
  token_pruner.py
    class ContentPruner
      def __init__(self, max_tokens: int = 5000)
      def prune(self, content: str, explanation: str = "") -> Tuple[str, bool]
      def _extract_keywords(self, explanation: str) -> List[str]
      def _score_lines(self, lines: List[str], keywords: List[str]) -> List[Tuple[int, float, str]]
      def _select_top_lines(self, scored_lines: List[Tuple[int, float, str]], max_tokens: int) -> List[int]
      def _rebuild_content(self, all_lines: List[str], selected_indices: List[int]) -> str
  trace_execution.py
    def trace_execution(func: Callable) -> Callable
